### useCheckbox()

checkbox 组件的 hook

```typescript
useCheckbox: (props: UseCheckboxProps, inputRef: RefObject<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    checked: boolean;
    indeterminate: boolean | undefined;
    inputProps: {
        name: string | undefined;
        disabled: boolean | undefined;
        type: string;
        checked: boolean;
        onChange: (e: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void;
        role: string;
        "aria-checked": boolean | "true" | "false" | "mixed" | undefined;
        className: string;
    };
    wrapperProps: {
        style: import("react").CSSProperties | undefined;
        className: string;
    };
    descriptionProps: {
        className: string;
    };
}
```

#### useCheckbox的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  props | [UseCheckboxProps](#usecheckboxprops) | checkbox 的 props |
|  inputRef | RefObject&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt; | input ref |

<b>返回值:</b>

{ checked: boolean; indeterminate: boolean \| undefined; inputProps: { name: string \| undefined; disabled: boolean \| undefined; type: string; checked: boolean; onChange: (e: ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;) =&gt; void; role: string; "aria-checked": boolean \| "true" \| "false" \| "mixed" \| undefined; className: string; }; wrapperProps: { style: import("react").CSSProperties \| undefined; className: string; }; descriptionProps: { className: string; }; }
